tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride, which is likely of limited clinical significance in the absence of other electrolyte disturbances or acid-base abnormalities. Renal function, glycemic control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Overall, results are stable and do not indicate acute pathology.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
